theme: vaccine stockpiles placed before anyone is sick
title: Prepositioned Doses: Hedging Against the Worst Seed City
strategies: do-nothing baseline: zero doses everywhere (matches the checker's own baseline)
population-proportional greedy: fully dose the highest-population cities first until the budget runs out

multi-scenario separator hitting-set: for every scenario build a shortest-mobility-path tree from its seed city, credit each city with the downstream population that would be cut off if it alone were dosed, then knapsack-greedily buy cities by (summed cross-scenario cut population)/cost so cheap cities that separate MANY scenarios' spread trees get bought before expensive high-population cities that only help one scenario
invalid: negative dose counts / budget overspend
